description:

Un titre puissant signé Petit Pays et Les Sans-Visas, sorti il y a plus de deux décennies, qui nous transporte dans l’univers vibrant du Makossa Love.
Avec sa voix unique et ses mélodies empreintes d’émotion, ce morceau demeure un véritable classique de la musique camerounaise.

title: ICI C'EST LE CAMEROUN
description: A la base un beat d'une chanson de l'américain Childish Gambino ceci est un projet version camerounaise illustrateur des réalités de notre merveilleux pays le Cameroun. A travers une satire via l'ironie,Je viens montrer le visage de notre société que certains traduiront de tumultueuse mais malgré tout nous aimons énormément car pays de paix ainsi je prône la paix et l'unité car c'est tout ce que nous avons de plus cher.

title: Mr. Leo - Kemayo [Official Video]
description:
Download & Listen to "Kemayo" Audio here https://soundcloud.com/alphabetterrecords/mr-leo-kemayo-prodby-salatiel

After teaching us how to love with ‘E Go Beta’ and ‘On Va Gerer’, Mr Leo is thrilling us again with this new video for his song titled ‘Kemayo.’ Kemayo is the story of a man who caught himself in the web of unfaithfulness. A man who found comfort in the arms of another woman at the detriment of his home. The song exposes these vices that are continuously plaguing our society; unfaithfulness and sorcery. Mr. Leo tells the story in French, the Cameroonian way, using adlibs that we all can relate to. It couldn’t have been told any better!

Dr. Nkeng Stephens and Artnurin put their creative wits together to bring the story to life through the video. It expresses the story in amazing visuals that translate emotions. You have to watch it!

“Stand By Me” is Daphne’s heartfelt letter to her fans. Once under the bright stage lights, she now follows a deep calling for marriage, motherhood, and family. title: Duc Z, Prophète chez lui à Dschang avec Show Time Vacances et FBI COM
description:
La maxime selon laquelle « nul n’est prophète chez soi » peut se targuer de marcher chez tout le monde dans le département de la Menoua sauf chez le jeune Djoumessi Ulrich plus connu sous le nom DUC-Z, artiste musicien. Le natif de Foreke-Dschang a plusieurs fois été tête d’affiche ou guest des spectacles dans la ville universitaire de l’ouest-Cameroun et à chaque fois, c’est toujours un peu plus de monde qui sacrifie tout pour accueillir son show. Ce dimanche 24 juillet 2016, DUC-Z, invité de Feelingué Boy International(FBI) s’est produit au colisée discothèque pour le plaisir des invités de l’évènement Show Time Vacances. Et comme personne ne l’a plus fait depuis plusieurs années, c’est une enceinte pleine à craquer qui a accueilli cette étoile, l’un des précurseurs du RnB et de la musique urbaine camerounaise
Le show de DUC-Z était programmé pour la deuxième partie de cet évènement qui s’ouvre aux jeunes vacanciers de la ville de Dschang tous les dimanches à 14h par sa phase « Délire + Challenge » sauf que les organisateurs n’auraient jamais dû introduire la star dans la salle de spectacle avant l’heure du show puisqu’il y a trouvé un public jeune et fan de lui qui ne voulait pour rien au monde le laisser se retirer même s’il allait revenir. Conséquence, DUC-Z sera obligé de faire la première partie de son show et chemin faisant, sera étonné que « voilà ça », sa toute récente livraison musicale est reprise en cœur par le nombreux public venu le regarder.
« …Je suis béni de Dieu, comme j’ai dit dans une chanson, c’est Dieu qui m’a donné, je suis chez moi, je suis à Dschang et le public venu me voir est super nombreux, je suis très content, merci à l’initiative de FBI.COM, ce sont des jeunes…ils sont très jeunes pour faire ça…ils réussissent quant même à se mettre ensemble pour faire des choses, ce sont des initiatives à encourager… » a dit l’artiste DUC-Z à la fin de son premier passage au colisée discothèque.
Carlos De Bordeaux

QUI EST WATTO DE SOUZA?
#WattoDeSouza est un jeune prodige de la #musiquecamerounaise il a opté pour le rythme populaire #Mbole qui monte en puissance au #Cameroun en ce moment. Il nous livre ici son deuxième single intitulé #LA_FILLE_LA. 
Dans ce titre il nous parle de la vie des filles des quartiers populaires de #Yaounde milieu dans lequel il grandit. A tort ou à raison elles sont très souvent cataloguées comme étant faciles, mais l'auteur nous fait comprendre que ce n’est pas toujours le cas, qu'il y en a qui sont digne d'être femme et mère , et que si tu attrapes ta perle rare dans le #kwatta tu la serres, la colles et tu lui fais des enfants, en somme il ne faut pas perdre le temps à la #femme camerounaise quand on l'aime, d’où qu'elle soit. 

Il ambitionne d'inscrire son nom à la suite de ceux des artistes désormais connus tels que #PetitMalo, #HappyDEffoulan, #PetitBozard, #DjLexus, #CrazyMIX et autres #PetitVirus qui ont réussi à faire du #Mbolé, un #RythmeCamerounais presque incontournable aujourd'hui.

Le titre LA FILLE LÀ est disponible sur toutes les plateformes de téléchargement légal.

title: Maahlox le vibeur ft Happy & Minks ( CAN 2022 ) Official video.
description:
Orange CM nous présente l’hymne des supporters de la CAN avec 
Levibeur Maahlox, 
Happy d’Effoulan  et 
MiNk's 🔥🔥🔥🤩🤩🤩
L’hymne intitulé « Tu joues même quoi ? » est bâti sous un rythme appelé localement « Mbolé », une musique des quartiers chauds de Yaoundé devenue nationale. Cette musique s’adapte volontiers aux pas des danses populaires de plusieurs pays du continent.
Le scénario qui présente le parcours d’une fan vers le match, nous rappelle à quel point le football peut être rassembleur et réconciliateur, un vrai message d’espoir pour l’Afrique en général et le Cameroun en particulier.
L’image n’est pas en reste, vous découvrirez dans ce clip, les couleurs, les tambours et les fans de tous les pays de la CAN.
Comme dit le slogan Camerounais « la CAN sera sucrée »
Et nous vous attendons tous pour danser le « Mbolé.

title: Salatiel - Anita [Official Video]
description:
Salatiel, the Award winning producer, artist and Founder of Alpha Better Records comes this time with a powerful massage in his latest single entitled “Anita”. 

Anita is a story of a girl who got carried away by money and nightlife. She had her love from school days but didn’t take it serious. She went ahead with the lifestyle and got drugged and rapped by several guys which led to her being pregnant without knowing who the actual father is. Love conquers all, despite all, Her school lover came back and took her in because in love, we only choose once. Love is unconditional

title: Minister Etta | Louanges à Bensikin 🇨🇲🇨🇲 | Bamiléké Praise Medley | Musique Gospel Camerounaise
description:
🎶 Vivez la joie de la louange ! 🎶
Rejoignez-nous pour un voyage musical exaltant avec la dernière sortie du ministre Etta, le Bamileke Praise Medley ! Enregistré en direct lors du concert électrisant Night of Medleys 2024, ce medley entremêle magnifiquement des compositions originales avec des chœurs populaires appréciés qui résonnent avec l'esprit de louange et d'adoration.
Plongez-vous dans des rythmes vibrants et des mélodies sincères qui célèbrent le riche héritage culturel du peuple Bamileke. Chaque note est un témoignage de foi, de joie et de communauté, vous invitant à élever la voix et à vous joindre à la célébration.
Ne manquez pas cette puissante expression d'adoration : appuyez sur lecture, laissez votre esprit s'envoler et partagez la joie de la louange !
🔔 Abonnez-vous pour plus de musique inspirante et de mises à jour du ministre Etta ! 🔔

title: Mr Leo - Je T'aime ft. Hiro [Official Video] (Music Camerounaise)
description:
"Je T'aime" performed by Mr Leo and Hiro

Directed by Dr. Nkeng Stephens and Artnurin. Song produced by Akwandor.

Twitter x Instagram: @MrLeo237
Facebook: Mr Leo - Artist

Mr LEO, born FONYUY NSOBUNRIKA LEONARD on the 31st August 1990 is a Cameroonian singer-songwriter and artist. His stage name is Mr.LEO coded Philantropic.

Early life:
Boy from the Barracks
Mr LEO was born in Buea and grew up in a small military camp called “Waders Barracks” at “Clerks Quarters” around the center of Buea, the South-Western part of Cameroon. The camp was small but a real ghetto on its own full of love, hate, violence, poverty, 80% soldiers (mostly the men) and , 15% farmers (mostly the wives), love amongst kids and conflicts amongst parents trying to bring their military lives into their homes yet everyone so hardworking. Twelve years later, Mr LEO moved to another small town (Molyko) still inside Buea where his life as an artist took off.

Background: 
Black Boy
Mr Leo is the third in a family of four siblings with an elder sister as the first, an elder brother the second, and a kid brother the last.
Three years into his new town(Molyko), Mr.Leo joins a school choir (The Breakthrough Voices). This choir was full of amazing singers but his singing at that time was so poor that the choir did an album and he was not opportune to sing on a single track. From that moment he knew singing was not for him and so many times he wanted to give up but a few singers in the choir (Salatiel, Blaise-B) brought him close and will always tell him “there’s a difference between someone who cannot sing at all and someone who can but doesn’t know yet how to use his or her voice”. He became so close to salatiel and they will meet every morning at Salatiel’s place and vocalize and since Salatiel was a pianist, he will play and they sing together and gradually, his singing got better. About a year after, Salatiel started working in a studio (M1 Studio) and once a while Mr Leo will go to his job site and just sit and watch him work. Just being around and seeing how people made music and recorded tracks gradually stirred up that anxiety in him to be like them and that was when he started dreaming of becoming a musician. Sometimes he was stopped from entering the studio and even when he did get in, he got booted out but he didn’t stop going and his passion for music only grew bigger. In a little while, Salatiel patched him with one of the smaller engineers in the studio and they did some tracks together. People would listen to them, laugh and took piece of mockery on them but they took heed to Salatiel who would always make some corrections and run them for a rerecord. BETTER still, record another track to check in the Leo Progress. Despite opposition from Parents who offered education first, Mr Leo will always snick out and book studio sessions to do demos. Taking inspiration from great artists like Seal, Lemar, Garou, 2face Idibia, his singing got better and better and so did his song writing skills. In 2010 Salatiel himself started producing songs for Mr Leo and has been his music partner and producer ever since. The Leo-Salatiel bond then invested "focus" on Mr Leo adopting a unique style with fragrance of originality. A year after, Salatiel came up with a record label “Alpha Better Records” and Mr Leo was his first signed artist. They recorded songs time and again trying to find the perfect song to use as Mr Leo’s first single. A song that will cut across English and French Cameroonians and Africans, cut across the youths and the aged. Early 1014 they came up with the single “E Go Better”. It’s cool nature, charming lyrics and melody touched everyone who came across it. A few months after, having taking spot in the Singit Cameroon 2014 Talent scout (where Mr. LEO humbly aired his voice), the Singit it immidiately took special interest in A voice so rich and so rare. They got in contact with Julia L Gham(producer of the Singit Cameroon), President of the “The PowerHouse Ent.Inc" in America who partnered with “Alpha Better Records” and provided their full support in other to boost up the productions and promotion of the single “E Go Better” and production of Mr Leo’s first album. 
Mr. Leo has his fans at heart and with an everyday experience, he speaks to the world through music. Discover Mr.Leo. Call him Philanthropic.
#MrLeo #CameroonMusic #JamaisJamais #JSuisDésolé #LoveOriginal #Femme #JeSuisMoiCommeÇa #Pray #Partout #CestFaux #JeTaime

title: TESTAMENT DE LOUANGE
description:
Les brebis retrouvées sont une communauté chrétienne spécialisée pour partager l'évangile avec les enfants de la rue, les pauvres, les démunis, les veufs, veuves,femmes stériles, païens et personnes aux coeurs brisés , et ceci dans une neutralité absolue sans provocation, critiques, ni injures.
Les brebis retrouvées vivent dans une très grande solidarité, elles sont unies et l'entente est totale. Solidarité oblige. Une famille divisée ne peut pas prospérer ainsi qu'une ville divisée.
Nous remercions tous les enfants de Dieu qui nous soutiennent et qui aiment partager la parole de Dieu avec nous. Nous avons aussi plusieurs témoignages que nous partagerons avec vous.
A noter que les brebis résident en Europe

description:
🎤 Ténor - NGON EYA (Hommage à Da'ak Janvier) 🌟

🔥 Découvrez le tout dernier titre de Ténor, une ode émotionnelle à la mémoire de Da'ak Janvier.

Ténor, l'une des stars montantes de la scène musicale camerounaise, rend un vibrant hommage à Da'ak Janvier, une figure incontournable de la culture camerounaise, avec son nouveau morceau "NGON EYA". title: TENOR - S'aimer Bien Feat @CYSOULOfficiel & @blackystarofficiel2068
description:
"S’aimer bien" est une chanson qui 
décrit une relation dans laquelle l’intensité de l’amour est si forte, si passionnée, qu’elle finit par devenir des fois destructrice ou dysfonctionnelle.

Le message envoyé par les artistes dans cette chanson est un message fort pour toutes ces personnes qui vivent un amour réel, sincère, mais malgré la profondeur des sentiments, l’amour peut être mal canalisé, trop exigeant, trop fusionnel, ou empreint de peurs, de blessures, voire d’une dépendance affective, empêchant un amour sain, équilibré et respectueux de chacun.

Dans cette œuvre, l’idée est surtout de présenter un autre aspect de l’amour, il peut être réel mais la manière d’aimer peut aussi ne pas être la bonne. Trop d’amour mal exprimé peut étouffer, blesser ou détruire.
Écoutez l’audio de "S’aimer bien" sur toutes les plateformes de streaming via le lien 👉🏾 https://orcd.co/saimer_bien

Born and raised in Cameroon, Big AC and Tahbax bring raw energy, sharp rhymes, and unmatched rhythm to the mic. Their performance on PUNCHLINE showcases the depth of Cameroonian rap and highlights the skill, creativity, and passion driving Africa’s hip-hop scene. This freestyle is a testament to their talent and dedication, leaving fans craving more.

Big AC and Tahbax are Cameroonian rappers known for their hard-hitting flows and memorable freestyle skills. Blending Pidgin, street wisdom, and lyrical creativity, they represent the vibrant and evolving rap culture of Cameroon.

TRIGAD TV is a creative platform dedicated to showcasing emerging talent from Cameroon and beyond. PUNCHLINE is a rap series that captures freestyle performances, cyphers, and unique expressions of African hip-hop. This song is for everyone who has seen God show up when men gave up, for those who waited, prayed, cried, and finally experienced a divine turnaround. If God has ever surprised you with favor, healing, breakthrough, or restoration, then this song is your song.

Let this sound lift your spirit, strengthen your faith, and remind you that Baba no dey fail. He did it before, and He will do it again.

🎶 Listen • Dance • Testify

title: Vinhora -BAMENIAN (Pikin for BAMENDA)Directed by Gody Pro
description: In this energetic music video, Cameroonian artist Vinhora brings the vibrant culture of Bamenda to life in his hit track "BAMENIAN (Pikin for BAMENDA)." Directed by Gody Pro, the video showcases the dynamic energy, colorful style, and spirit of Bamenda through captivating visuals and lively choreography. Vinhora’s lyrics celebrate his heritage, blending Afrobeat rhythms with traditional influences to create a unique sound that honors the heart of Cameroon. With stunning locations, cultural references, and high-energy dance scenes, this video is a powerful homage to Bamenda and its people.

title: Mr. Leo - C'est faux [Official Video] (Music Camerounaise)
description:
"C'est Faux" performed by Mr Leo.

Directed by Dr. Nkeng Stephens. Song produced by Salatiel.

Twitter x Instagram: @MrLeo237
Facebook: Mr Leo - Artist

Mr LEO, born FONYUY NSOBUNRIKA LEONARD on the 31st August 1990 is a Cameroonian singer-songwriter and artist. His stage name is Mr.LEO coded Philantropic.

Early life:
Boy from the Barracks
Mr LEO was born in Buea and grew up in a small military camp called “Waders Barracks” at “Clerks Quarters” around the center of Buea, the South-Western part of Cameroon. The camp was small but a real ghetto on its own full of love, hate, violence, poverty, 80% soldiers (mostly the men) and , 15% farmers (mostly the wives), love amongst kids and conflicts amongst parents trying to bring their military lives into their homes yet everyone so hardworking. Twelve years later, Mr LEO moved to another small town (Molyko) still inside Buea where his life as an artist took off.

Background: 
Black Boy
Mr Leo is the third in a family of four siblings with an elder sister as the first, an elder brother the second, and a kid brother the last.
Three years into his new town(Molyko), Mr.Leo joins a school choir (The Breakthrough Voices). This choir was full of amazing singers but his singing at that time was so poor that the choir did an album and he was not opportune to sing on a single track. From that moment he knew singing was not for him and so many times he wanted to give up but a few singers in the choir (Salatiel, Blaise-B) brought him close and will always tell him “there’s a difference between someone who cannot sing at all and someone who can but doesn’t know yet how to use his or her voice”. He became so close to salatiel and they will meet every morning at Salatiel’s place and vocalize and since Salatiel was a pianist, he will play and they sing together and gradually, his singing got better. About a year after, Salatiel started working in a studio (M1 Studio) and once a while Mr Leo will go to his job site and just sit and watch him work. Just being around and seeing how people made music and recorded tracks gradually stirred up that anxiety in him to be like them and that was when he started dreaming of becoming a musician. Sometimes he was stopped from entering the studio and even when he did get in, he got booted out but he didn’t stop going and his passion for music only grew bigger. In a little while, Salatiel patched him with one of the smaller engineers in the studio and they did some tracks together. People would listen to them, laugh and took piece of mockery on them but they took heed to Salatiel who would always make some corrections and run them for a rerecord. BETTER still, record another track to check in the Leo Progress. Despite opposition from Parents who offered education first, Mr Leo will always snick out and book studio sessions to do demos. Taking inspiration from great artists like Seal, Lemar, Garou, 2face Idibia, his singing got better and better and so did his song writing skills. In 2010 Salatiel himself started producing songs for Mr Leo and has been his music partner and producer ever since. The Leo-Salatiel bond then invested "focus" on Mr Leo adopting a unique style with fragrance of originality. A year after, Salatiel came up with a record label “Alpha Better Records” and Mr Leo was his first signed artist. They recorded songs time and again trying to find the perfect song to use as Mr Leo’s first single. A song that will cut across English and French Cameroonians and Africans, cut across the youths and the aged. Early 1014 they came up with the single “E Go Better”. It’s cool nature, charming lyrics and melody touched everyone who came across it. A few months after, having taking spot in the Singit Cameroon 2014 Talent scout (where Mr. LEO humbly aired his voice), the Singit it immidiately took special interest in A voice so rich and so rare. They got in contact with Julia L Gham(producer of the Singit Cameroon), President of the “The PowerHouse Ent.Inc" in America who partnered with “Alpha Better Records” and provided their full support in other to boost up the productions and promotion of the single “E Go Better” and production of Mr Leo’s first album. 
Mr. Leo has his fans at heart and with an everyday experience, he speaks to the world through music. Discover Mr.Leo. Call him Philanthropic.
#MrLeo #CameroonMusic #JamaisJamais #JSuisDésolé #LoveOriginal #Femme #JeSuisMoiCommeÇa #Pray #Partout #CestFaux #JeTaime

un genre vibrant et envoûtant originaire du Cameroun. Plongez dans les rythmes entraînants et les mélodies captivantes de cette musique emblématique qui fait danser les cœurs et les corps depuis des décennies.
👉 Abonnez-vous à ma chaîne pour ne manquer aucune de mes prochaines vidéos et rejoignez notre communauté de passionnés de makossa.

title: Cameroon Urban Music Video Mix, Cameroon Music 2024. Kocee, Tzy Panchak, Jovi, Rinyu. Vol 34
description:
TOP CAMEROON URBAN MUSIC VIDEO MIX, CAMEROON MUSIC 2024. KOCEE, TZY PANCHAK, JOVI, RINYU. BLANCHE BAILLY, MAGASCO, LOIC SUMFOR, ASABA, MUSS, ELISHA K, BLAISE B, SALATIEL, MIMIE, LYDOL,  CHARLOTTE DIPANDA, STANDLEY ENOW, MIC MONSTA, ULANDA, AJ BAHBOY, KAMENI

Cameroon Music
The music of the Cameroon includes diverse traditional and modern musical genres. The best-known contemporary genre is makossa, a popular style that has gained fans across Africa, and its related dance craze bikutsi.
The earliest recorded popular music from Cameroon comes from the 1930s, when the most popular styles were imported pop music and French-style chanson.
The urbanization of Cameroon has had a major influence on the country's music. Migration to the city of Yaoundé, for example, was a major cause for the popularization of bikutsi music. During the 1950s, bars sprang up across the city to accommodate the influx of new inhabitants and soon became a symbol for Cameroonian identity in the face of colonialism.
In the 1990s, both makossa and bikutsi declined in popularity as a new wave of genres entered mainstream audiences in Cameroon. Other tribes in Cameroon brought up their traditional rhythms and most of the youths now embrace the world new music. Here is a video mix of Cameroon Music 2024 for your pleasure.
Thank you for subscribing.

title: CAMEROUN ON VIBE 🇨🇲 – SONG AMAPIANO 🔥By Petit Baco Music
description:
🔥 CAMEROUN ON VIBE 🇨🇲 – SONG AMAPIANO 🔥
By Petit Baco Music

Plonge dans l’ambiance 🔥 du Cameroun avec ce son Amapiano unique qui rassemble toutes les villes et villages 🇨🇲💃🏽
De Yaoundé à Douala, de Garoua à Bamenda, du Nord au Sud, de l’Est à l’Ouest… on danse ensemble !

title: 🇨🇲✨ 20 MAY AMAPIANO CAMEROON THE WORLD IN ONE POINT
description:
Through its cultural diversity, rich music, traditions, languages, and united people, Cameroon reflects the true spirit and greatness of Africa.
This creation celebrates the National Day of May 20th — a symbol of unity, peace, pride, and patriotism.

🎶 Blending modern vibes, African heritage, and futuristic energy, this tribute highlights Cameroon as “Africa in miniature… the continent itself.”

title: AVEIRO DJESS (LE NYAMA)officiel
description:
Le titre "Le Nyama" est le symbol d’une idéologie de bosseurs, de grouilleurs, de warmans et de bozayeurs qui se battent nuit et jour pour  trouver le pain quotidien, voir plus loin et accomplir leurs rêves. Elle est une musique libératrice, motivatrice qui rappelle que nous devons nous libérer de cette prison qu'est la honte et le complexe du metier duquel découle nos revenus. Aussi petit , salissant, parfois humiliant et même difficile, nous devons en être fiers . 

Je dédie cette œuvre a tous les champions qui s'accrochent  à la vie d'une maniere ou d'une autre , qui  sortent très tôt et reviennent très tard pour leurs familles et eux-mêmes. 

Bangando

title: K-TINO - La Petite Adeda (1998)
description:
[WIKI] :
Catherine Edoa Ngoa, ou K-Tino, est une chanteuse de Bikutsi très populaire au Cameroun, surnommée « la femme du peuple ». Née à Yaoundé en 1966. Elle chante en ewondo et en français.
Zanzibar Epémé, guitariste du groupe "Les têtes brûlées" sera son mentor spirituel à ses débuts. À la fin des années 1980, elle prend le micro au cabaret « Escalier bar » du quartier Nlongkak de Yaoundé. Elle chantera pendant quelques mois avec « Les zombis de la capitale » jusqu'en 1991. Connue au début en tant que Catino, elle prendra ensuite le nom de K-Tino et sortira son premier album « Ascenseur ».
Discographie :
Ascenseur (1991, Chalet Productions Vol.1)
Thermomètre (1993)
Casse Bambou (1995)

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGF17r6aD_v9e_z6Spo57wA?sub_confirmation=1

Mr LEO, born FONYUY NSOBUNRIKA LEONARD on the 31st August 1990 is a Cameroonian singer-songwriter and artist. His stage name is Mr.LEO coded Philantropic.

Early life:
Boy from the Barracks
Mr LEO was born in Buea and grew up in a small military camp called “Waders Barracks” at “Clerks Quarters” around the center of Buea, the South-Western part of Cameroon. The camp was small but a real ghetto on its own full of love, hate, violence, poverty, 80% soldiers (mostly the men) and , 15% farmers (mostly the wives), love amongst kids and conflicts amongst parents trying to bring their military lives into their homes yet everyone so hardworking. Twelve years later, Mr LEO moved to another small town (Molyko) still inside Buea where his life as an artist took off.

Background: 
Black Boy
Mr Leo is the third in a family of four siblings with an elder sister as the first, an elder brother the second, and a kid brother the last.
Three years into his new town(Molyko), Mr.Leo joins a school choir (The Breakthrough Voices). This choir was full of amazing singers but his singing at that time was so poor that the choir did an album and he was not opportune to sing on a single track. From that moment he knew singing was not for him and so many times he wanted to give up but a few singers in the choir (Salatiel, Blaise-B) brought him close and will always tell him “there’s a difference between someone who cannot sing at all and someone who can but doesn’t know yet how to use his or her voice”. He became so close to salatiel and they will meet every morning at Salatiel’s place and vocalize and since Salatiel was a pianist, he will play and they sing together and gradually, his singing got better. About a year after, Salatiel started working in a studio (M1 Studio) and once a while Mr Leo will go to his job site and just sit and watch him work. Just being around and seeing how people made music and recorded tracks gradually stirred up that anxiety in him to be like them and that was when he started dreaming of becoming a musician. Sometimes he was stopped from entering the studio and even when he did get in, he got booted out but he didn’t stop going and his passion for music only grew bigger. In a little while, Salatiel patched him with one of the smaller engineers in the studio and they did some tracks together. People would listen to them, laugh and took piece of mockery on them but they took heed to Salatiel who would always make some corrections and run them for a rerecord. BETTER still, record another track to check in the Leo Progress. Despite opposition from Parents who offered education first, Mr Leo will always snick out and book studio sessions to do demos. Taking inspiration from great artists like Seal, Lemar, Garou, 2face Idibia, his singing got better and better and so did his song writing skills. In 2010 Salatiel himself started producing songs for Mr Leo and has been his music partner and producer ever since. The Leo-Salatiel bond then invested "focus" on Mr Leo adopting a unique style with fragrance of originality. A year after, Salatiel came up with a record label “Alpha Better Records” and Mr Leo was his first signed artist. They recorded songs time and again trying to find the perfect song to use as Mr Leo’s first single. A song that will cut across English and French Cameroonians and Africans, cut across the youths and the aged. Early 1014 they came up with the single “E Go Better”. It’s cool nature, charming lyrics and melody touched everyone who came across it. A few months after, having taking spot in the Singit Cameroon 2014 Talent scout (where Mr. LEO humbly aired his voice), the Singit it immidiately took special interest in A voice so rich and so rare. They got in contact with Julia L Gham(producer of the Singit Cameroon), President of the “The PowerHouse Ent.Inc" in America who partnered with “Alpha Better Records” and provided their full support in other to boost up the productions and promotion of the single “E Go Better” and production of Mr Leo’s first album. 
Mr. Leo has his fans at heart and with an everyday experience, he speaks to the world through music. Discover Mr.Leo. Call him Philanthropic.

title: Le BIKUTSI - Danse traditionnelle du Cameroun avec Arsène ETABA | Cabane de la Danse.
description:
Le BIKUTSI est une danse traditionnelle des peuples des régions du Centre, Est et Sud du Cameroun dits Peuples Betis Be Nnanga.
Étymologiquement elle signifie "Nous frappons le pied au sol" (Bià Kút Sí), phrase qui symboliquement retrace l'histoire des revendications entre hommes et des femmes des peuples betis où ces dernières se retrouvaient secrètement pour aborder les questions de relation, d'équité et égalité dans les foyer.

On dit d'elle aussi d'être la Danse des Esprits Betis car pour rentrer dans l'Akút Ndàah (maison délabrée et délaissé habitée autrefois) il fallait danser d'une manière particulière : en martelant le sol de ce type de maison dit Akút Sí pour que les esprits de cette maison daignent vous autoriser à y accéder.

Les revendications qui étaient menées par des chants rythmés par des claquements de mains, des mouvements saccadés et saccagés avec la particularité de toujours marquer le sol de vifs pas, donnant naissance à une gestuelle et agilité particulière. 
L'évolution du BIKUTSI se fera par l'avènement des hommes dans cette quête matérialisé surtout par l'apport musical (instruments traditionnels : TamTam, Tambours, Nyass (maracas))

title: Roga Roga & Extra Musica - BOKOKO (Official Video)
description:
Roga Roga & Extra Musica - BOKOKO (Official Video). Abonnez-vous à la chaîne YouTube de ROGA ROGA : https://www.youtube.com/c/ROGAROGAOfficiel.
Écoutez BOKOKO sur Spotify, iTunes, etc... : https://bfan.link/bokoko 
Quel génie et quels talents !
Avec le titre éponyme « BOKOKO », Roga Roga frappe fort un EP qui se veut incisif mais joue également sur l’instrumental, la poésie et le chant sans musique avec les voix sensuelles des chanteurs du Groupe Extra Musica, ce qui se fait tout naturellement revenir aux sources, à l’épopée des Zangul et aux moments des « Racines ».
La structure de la musique Zangul dans BOKOKO est ainsi faite qu'elle évoque, envahit, saisit et émeut la personne tout entière. 
La régularité du rythme crée l'expectative mais retarde sa matérialisation, ce qui fait que chaque mesure crée un état de promesse et de retrait, de suggestion et de rejet avant l'avènement ultime.
Sur ce titre BOKOKO, Roga Roga déclare vouloir revaloriser l’identité africaine partant le Congo. C’est une extase dans son sens le plus authentique, car elle trouble le calme statique qui découle du rythme normal par l'accentuation des voix, des sons, mettant en valeur non pas « ceci » mais « cela », non plus « cela » mais « ceci », ce qui suggère à l'un de se fixer sur l'autre, le prévisible, l'immédiat et du réel, à l'imprévisible, au lointain et au réel.
Ce sens évocateur de la satisfaction différée mais imminente est atteint, selon une explication, par l'utilisation simultanée de rythmes et de mesures différents, qui pousse Roga Roga à créer l'impression d'une déviation par rapport à ce qui est normal ou attendu.
C’est ce recours présent des sources traditionnelles ancestrales africaines et dans le sens d'une identité plus nouvelle et plus vraie des anciens que gît l'espoir d'entendre à nouveau et toujours notre style, la musique et la danse du terroir.

description:
Continue the Classic African Oldies Lingala journey here: Bibamba mix to Vol. 4 with Fally, Werrason & Koffi:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLixawf4zdI0SDLWhY_7v96GWDavXcm30s

New Classic African Oldies Vol. 4 video: https://youtu.be/7f-t6ZonQUo
Full African Oldies 4-volume playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLixawf4zdI0RB3fm53hm4AkHyldxkXN8y

Classic African Oldies Mix – Lingala Ndombolo Coupé Bibamba & 1er Gaou
Non-stop African party anthems from the late ’80s, ’90s & early 2000s! Dive into high-energy Lingala and Ndombolo from Congo, pan-African Soukous guitar fireworks, Côte d’Ivoire’s Coupé-Décalé groove, and Cameroon’s funky Makossa basslines. Legends like Awilo Longomba, JB Mpiana, Koffi Olomidé, Magic System, Sam Fan Thomas, Kanda Bongo Man, Pépé Kallé and more keep the dance-floor burning from start to finish.

Whether you’re hosting a throwback bash, vibing solo, or need workout fuel—hit play, turn it up, and let the rhythms move you. 💃🏿🕺🏿

title: Cameroon Traditional Medley "NJANG" | Dr. YEMBE Ministering @ ROMI 2022 Yaoundé Night of Worship
description:
Organised by Royal Ministries International ( ROMI), the Christian Community Excellence Week (CCEW) is a time of serving our community through free medical care, food donations, street evangelism, and capacity building fora. The CCEW culminates in the *Yaounde Night of Worship (YNW),* a 10 hour Worship and Praise Service unto God. 

The YNW is unique in its genre. Non denominational and non discriminatory, the Night of Worship gives Christians the opportunity to fellowship in Word, Prayers, and Songs 🎵 from across the world 🌎 

Today's video release is a folkloric gospel medley from the grass fields of the North West of Cameroon 🇨🇲. 
We praise God in one of the local languages, the Wimbum dialect. 

Celebrate with us as Dr. Yembe leads God's people in praise and worship through a series of songs that depict a heart posture of thanksgiving and joyful celebration unto our Great God for His goodness and Love.

title: Dieu qui bénit Amapiano (English subtitle) #cameroun #congo #france #usa
description:
Bienvenue sur notre chaîne chrétienne 100% Adoration, un espace consacré entièrement à la louange, à l’adoration et à la recherche sincère de la présence de Dieu.
Ici, nous élevons le nom de Jésus-Christ, le Roi des rois et le Seigneur des seigneurs, par des chants d’adoration inspirés, des prières profondes et des moments de communion avec le Saint-Esprit.

Cette chaîne est née d’un désir : voir des vies transformées, des cœurs restaurés et des âmes rapprochées de Dieu.
Que vous traversiez des moments de joie ou des saisons de douleur — maladie, solitude, découragement, épreuves familiales ou spirituelles — sachez que Jésus est présent. Il guérit, il console, il relève et il redonne l’espérance.

À travers chaque chant, nous proclamons l’amour du Père, la puissance de la croix et la victoire acquise par le sang de Jésus.
Notre prière est que, là où vous êtes, la paix de Dieu vous envahisse, que votre foi soit renouvelée et que le ciel touche votre vie.

Prenez ce temps pour vous arrêter, écouter, adorer et laisser le Saint-Esprit agir librement en vous.
Que le nom de Jésus soit glorifié, aujourd’hui et pour l’éternité. Amen. 🙏🔥

#cameroun #gabon #congo #coted'ivoire #musiquechretienne

title: Top Best Cameroon Gospel Njang || Traditional Gospel Melodies
description:
Experience the beauty and depth of Top Best Cameroon Gospel Njang, a rich collection of traditional gospel melodies rooted in culture, faith, and heartfelt worship. These songs blend powerful Christian messages with authentic Cameroon traditional rhythms, creating a unique worship experience that touches the soul.

Perfect for lovers of cultural gospel music, deep worship moments, and those who appreciate Cameroon traditional gospel (Njang), this compilation will uplift your spirit and celebrate the heritage of gospel music in Cameroon.

👉 Remember to like, share, and subscribe for more inspiring Cameroon gospel music and traditional worship melodies.

title: CYSOUL - KIDNAPPE FEAT LADY PONCE (CLIP OFFICIEL)
description:
Cysoul - Kidnappé feat Lady Ponce (Clip Officiel)

“Kidnappé” raconte cet amour qui marque au point de troubler la mémoire et le repos.

Dans ce clip, deux générations artistiques se rencontrent.
Une voix ancrée dans l’héritage du bikutsi, une autre portée par une écriture plus intime et contemporaine.
Entre retenue et intensité, le visuel accompagne cette tension : aimer, résister, se laisser emporter.

Une chanson qui danse, même quand le cœur vacille.

title: Rinyu - Na Mala (Official Video)
description:
New Music Cameroon, Performed by: @RINYU  
Written and Composed by: Achu Normad

-------VIDEO-----------

-------AUDIO-----------
Produced by: PhillBill (Douala Cameroon)
Production Director: Achu Normad
Guitar: Achu Normad
Record Label: Akumba Music LLC

Follow @RINYU 
Instagram @Rinyu_Official
Facebook & Twiter: @RinyuOfficial 

Follow Akumba Music: Facebook, Twitter, IG @AkumbaMusic
Digitally Distributed Worldwide by Akumba Music LLC

Rinyu - Na Mala 

After the enormous success of her single Controller, Cameroon’s new Urban Music Queen Rinyu returns with the official video Na Mala, to be released on Akumba Music’s YouTube Channel on Friday June 17th, 2022. 

The song Na Mala is track 3 from Rinyu’s Album Black Girl Magic and it’s Afro Salsa at its absolute best. A Makossa Vibe with a touch of Bossa Nova, driven by the ever present guitar rhythm of Achu Normad and laced with the sweet and soulful voice of the amazing Rinyu. 

Na Mala is Produced by PhillBill and the video Directed by Mr Adrenaline. This Classically inspired video clip stars Cameroon’s top Actor Daniel Nsang and tells the story of the insatiable desire of a married man for more women. 

Rinyu is currently Cameroon’s leading female artist and she’s barely scratched the surface yet, with regards to where she wants to be as an artist. Enjoy Na Mala and buckle up for more music as Rinyu continues with her Quest to conquer Africa and the world with the Cameroonian sound. 

----------------------------LYRICS--------------------------------------------------------------

title: Boy TAG - Meet TAG Pt1 (Freestyle Session -Official Video)
description:
Music video by Boy TAG performing "Freestyle Session". Filmed by Dr Nkeng Stephens.© 2017 Stevens Music Entertainment.

(Charlotte, USA — July 5, 2017) Steven’s Music Entertainment today announces the signing of Buea based artist, Tongwa Njopmu who goes by the stage name “Boy TAG” to its formidable roster of artists. 

A Producer, Songwriter, Rapper and Singer, Boy TAG will be releasing his debut single as a recording artist entitled “Mignoncite” globally in a few weeks. But to announce his arrival, TAG has recorded some of the best freestyle tracks you’ve heard out of Cameroon that will ensure he is ushered into the Cameroon music industry at the very top echelon.

Boy TAG has had a long relationship with music, going back to his childhood. These early exposures to different genre of music are the bases of his unique style and delivery. His productions are reminiscent of the past yet pregnant with all the essentials of the modern afro sounds. His ability to tell stories on a track in a relatable way will keep audiences glued to his every word.

"He is the next big thing in Cameroon Hip-hop! The Jay-Z of Cameroon has finally been born and this is when we put our hats down and bow down to real and natural talent that is so badly needed in the Cameroonian music (Hip-hop) industry." The HotJem’s Mbole Ekaney

In “Meet TAG Pt 1 (Free Style Session)”, TAG shows his versatility on different beats including Panda, Hein Pere, Et P8 Koi, Jagaban, and No kissing

“You’ve got to listen and watch carefully to witness the next best thing in the Kamer Hip Hop Scene” DJ Makoko

Tag has already written and produced records that will ensure his continuous presence in the Cameroon urban scene and he is excited to start building his fan base from the ground up and start staking his claim to be top gun. 

“Meet TAG Pt 1…” is available today on all SME digital outlets and we can’t wait to get all your feedback on this crazy mix of a freestyle session. 

“I am excited to be finally out of rap’s ‘...basement’ and into the limelight. I am ready for takeoff and I want to bring all aboard with me into this wonderful musical journey…am here, make way!” TAG

For booking, interviews, or promo copies, please contact SME Management at info.stevensme@gmail.com or at info@stevensme.com

description:
Memorable musical collaborations do not only come when a renown artist does a collaboration with another renown artist. A classic collaboration is when artist be it up and coming or established connect musically on a track.
The Na so freestyle challenge which was launched a little over two months ago by Tzy Panchak was welcomed by many vibrant up and coming artists who appreciated the piece of art and decided to put their touch to the freestyle. While all these freestyles were dope we had to make a tough decision on which artists to feature on the final cut. We sampled most of the freestyles and the committee uncharge selected these three formidable artist for this project. We are entirely grateful for every artist who contributed one way or another on this project and we pray God continues to bless your endeavors.

title: Tenor : il avait tout pour être le Maître Gims camerounais… et il a tout gâché
description:
Tenor avait tout.
La voix.
Le rap.
Le chant.
Le public.
Même Universal Music Africa.

Pendant quelques années, Tenor incarnait l’avenir de la musique camerounaise.
Beaucoup voyaient en lui le futur Maître Gims du Cameroun.

Alors pourquoi tout s’est arrêté ?

Dans cette vidéo, on retrace l’ascension et la chute de Tenor, en suivant ses titres dans l’ordre chronologique :
de Nathalie à Do le Dab,
de l’explosion nationale à Universal Music Africa,
jusqu’à la prison, la rupture avec l’industrie et le retour difficile en indépendant.

🎧 On parle de :
• ses premiers sons et pourquoi ils ont marché
• son rapport au buzz et aux réseaux sociaux
• son passage chez Universal et ses limites
• l’affaire judiciaire qui a tout stoppé
• ce qu’il reste aujourd’hui de sa carrière

Ce n’est pas une vidéo pour insulter Tenor.
C’est une leçon sur le succès trop rapide, l’exposition permanente et les pièges du bad buzz dans la musique africaine.

👉 Le talent suffit-il quand la maturité ne suit pas ?

💬 Dis-moi en commentaire :
Tenor aurait-il pu devenir une vraie star internationale ?

🔔 Abonne-toi pour plus d’analyses culturelles, musique africaine et histoires d’artistes.

description:
“Avancée ” is a national cry that depicts the pain, struggles, and suffering of the Cameroonian people. Through heartfelt lyrics and soul-stirring melodies, it tells the harsh realities of the Cameroonian people: hardship, corruption, and broken dreams — yet still holding on to hope for change.

This is more than just music — it’s a message. A cry for justice. A voice for those who have been silenced.

Music Producer: Mbunja

It's characterized by a rhythmic style of dance music that has gained global recognition, particularly with tracks like "Soul Makossa" by Manu Dibango.

description:
PRINCE AIMÉ presents the official video to VIVIANE (Remix), featuring Maahlox Le Vibeur , Magasco, Lili Anoma & Thérapie.

© 2024  Calabash Music and Entertainment Company

Writer/Composer: Clovis Paulin Feugan Tokam
Publisher: Lolhiphop Records
Prod: Jaures 𝑫𝑱 et 𝑫𝑱 terminator for ZONE2RAP
Video Director:  Tepson Art
Contact: calabashent@gmail.com / +15717510071


https://www.instagram.com/princeaimeofficial?igsh=OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA==

Plongez dans l’univers captivant de « Viviane », l’hymne emblématique du chanteur aveugle Prince Aimé. Initialement sortie en 2004, cette ballade puissante raconte l'histoire poignante d'un amour perdu, suite à une véritable expérience de vie où une jolie femme qu'il désirait l'a laissé fauché et a fait semblant de ne pas le reconnaître plus tard. Aujourd'hui, 20 ans plus tard, ses mélodies passionnées ont pris d'assaut les médias sociaux, inspirant des millions de vidéos, de remix et de mèmes générés par les utilisateurs à travers le monde. Ce remix officiel présente un casting dynamique de chanteurs camerounais, insufflant une nouvelle vie à un classique intemporel. Découvrez la profondeur émotionnelle et l’énergie contagieuse de « Viviane » : ce n’est pas seulement une chanson ; c'est un mouvement !



#Viviane  #VivianeRemix  #PrinceAimé #Viviano

title: Salatiel x Daphne - Comme ça (A Nous Deux) [Official Video]
description:
Stream "Comme Ca" on all Platforms. https://lnk.to/commeca  

High Man General, Salatiel and SME front liner, Daphne display musical chemistry in this single titled comme ça. This single is a mid-tempo one that has full potentials to hit your heart and stay on repeat on your playlist. Salatiel who doubles as the producer alongside Big Joe, decides to give us and exquisite taste of Africa in the visuals.

“There is nothing in life like the perfect love situation or the perfect couple, but there is love which is 2 people who can come together, accepting their differences and compromising for each other”. Alpha Better Records

Put together by Nkeng Stephens, the visuals are not only eye catching but tell a beautiful story of love. They don’t only accentuate on the understanding of each other’s imperfection but also focus on the willingness to work through these short comings with each other.
Other production credits go to:

Guitars by Marcien Oyono and Salatiel
Bass by Big Joe & Salatiel.
Mixed by Salatiel @ Alpha Better Records Studios
Mastered by Joern Broderson (Germany).

title: DJ EVANS   Sebene & Ndombolo Non stop Old schools
description: Ndombolo is a high-energy Congolese dance music genre known for its fast-paced rhythms, hip-swaying dance moves, and infectious, percussion-heavy beats. It emerged in the 1990s as a vibrant subgenre of soukous, incorporating modern synthesizers and electronic influences. Ndombolo is characterized by call-and-response vocals, intricate guitar work, and a frenetic, cyclic instrumental section called a sébéne.

title: Amy Angel - The Word (Official Video)
description:
Amy Angel - The Word (Official Video) 
official Video of The Word by Amy Angel, a Cameroon female  gospel singer. Out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks. My heart is overwhelmed with joy and I can't even express the depths of this joy. First and foremost, I want to thank God for looking into my distress and giving me the holy inspiration for this song. Also, I want to appreciate my beloved son, Favour(Shuga), for relentlessly promoting this song to a large audience. Enthusiastically, I am appreciating each and everyone of you for your constant love and support to this project🙏🏻 Your likes and shares brought us this far.  Mr. Lee and Director Tecnno Brain, I am sincerely grateful for a work well done. The former mixed and mastered this beautiful song while the latter shot and directed the music video. My heart goes to my makeup artist and also my designer, Naamah  and her beautiful sisters for assisting me throughout this period🙏🏻 May the good Lord bless and keep us🙏🏻 Shalom🙏🏻

Sarah Jane Crawford's entry, Stanley Enow, gives us his World Cup Freestyle 

English Translation 

Aha aha yeh yeh yeh
Yah yah Stanley Enow
Yeah Bayangi Boy, aah ah
Soft Touch on the beat

Guys, this journey started like a joke.
My friends were hustling hard while we were simply trying to keep up.

All they did was hustle real hard. Yes hustle real hard.
Stanley Enow I am a great hustler.

'Homey', I covered long distances on foot.
On my way back I'll pass by Mama Sarah to beg for some guavas 
I usually returned home late at night Daddy gave me lashes like real hard

What goes up, comes down
Stanley Enow smart gentleman duelling hard in a tough town.

I wandered around a lot, people thought I am a crazy guy. Stanley Enow! What a crazy guy.
What goes up must come down up.

title: Koinonia Discovery - Medley Bikutsi  | Video officielle
description:
Découvrez un spectacle envoûtant et rythmé comme jamais auparavant! Plongez dans l'univers enivrant du Bikutsi avec le medley sensationnel produit par les finalistes de la compétition Koinonia Discovery. 

Préparez-vous à être transporté par des mélodies captivantes et des pas de danse jniques.  Des jeune talentueux se sont réunis pour vous offrir une expérience musicale incomparable. Avec des arrangements innovants et une énergie débordante, cette vidéo promet de vous faire vibrer au rythme envoûtant du Bikutsi.

title: Afara Tsena – Afro Mbokalisation (Clip Officiel)
description:
👉🏻 allez-vous abonner https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100092282160444&mibextid=LQQJ4d  AFARA TSENA FUKUCHIMA est un artiste https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100092282160444&mibextid=LQQJ4d africain, auteur - compositeur de plusieurs chansons à succès sur le continent africain. Originaire du Congo Brazzaville, il a inventé son style qu'il a baptisé "LA MBOKALISATION". Ce concept très original est un mélange du style Couper - Décaler congolais inspiré de NDOMBOLO et des sonorités folkloriques du Congo.

Aujourd'hui, sa musique a conquis tout le continent africain et la diaspora africaine avec sa chanson phare "JALOUSIE". L'artiste a sorti son premier EP appelé "Coupé Décalais congolais" sur toutes les plateformes de téléchargement. La prochaine étape est de faire de son style, une des musiques de référence du continent africain et attirer les nouveaux mélomanes des autres continents (Europe, Amérique et Asie).

Toutes les vidéos et chansons importées dans sur cette chaine Youtube, il détient les droits d'auteur et l'exclusivité de de diffusion. title: Bebey Klorane  - Assimba (Miracle) Part 3: Un Concert Live d'Enregistrement Bikutsi.
description:
Ablaze Music présente un son du Cameroun pour le monde entier
Dès les premières secondes, Assimba vous attrape.
Le rythme est vivant. La batterie résonne fort. On est immédiatement plongé dans une ambiance de célébration, portée par une percussion africaine profonde, des instruments live parfaitement exécutés, et cette énergie vocale camerounaise où le peuple chante avec le chantre.

Chaque riff de guitare, chaque break vocal, chaque cri, chaque réponse du public est intentionnel. L'arrangement, la réalisation, l'émotion brute captée en direct… tout fusionne pour créer un moment sonore puissant. C’est africain. C’est authentique. C’est l’instant présent.

Et puis il y a Bebey Klorane. Une voix sortie de la Présence. Sa voix traverse l’espace avec autorité et douceur. On entend l’adoration, mais on ressent surtout son témoignage – vrai, profond, enraciné.

ASSIMBA signifie miracle, et ce projet en est un.
C’est la joie au cœur de l’épreuve.
C’est la danse avant même que le miracle n’arrive.
C’est la reconnaissance qu’on ne peut pas faire taire.

Enregistré en live au Cameroun.
Partagé au monde entier.
Préparez-vous à bouger, à ressentir et à célébrer les miracles.

Regardez. Aimez. Partagez. Abonnez-vous.
Ce n’est que le début.

title: Wan Shey - Folah (Remix) Feat. Magasco, Cornel Grace & Vinhora [Official Video]
description:
Wan Shey presents "Folah" — a powerful blend of emotion, culture and sound.

Featuring Magasco, Cornel Grace & Vinhora, "Folah*" is a journey through culture, memory and identity, inspired by the spirit of Nso’ and the depth of Cameroonian storytelling. This is more than music, it’s a call to reclaim our roots.

Directed by Takov Handson x Kinz Gilead, the visuals bring the song to life with a rich, nostalgic aesthetic that captures the essence of home, connection, and longing.


🎵 SONG CREDITS
Artist: Wan Shey

Follow @RINYU​ 
Instagram @Rinyu_Official

Follow Akumba Music: Facebook, Twitter, IG @AkumbaMusic
Digitally Distributed Worldwide by Akumba Music LLC

Akumba Music is pleased announce the upcoming release of Rinyu’s Single “Controller” from the Album “Black Girl Magic. Controller is modern Makossa at its absolute best. Rinyu’s sweet and soulful voice blends effortlessly with some fancy Cameroonian style guitar rhythm, and the entire ensemble rides steadily on a makossa/afrobeats style beat. Controller is produced by Dijay Karl and Video directed by Kwedi Nelson. The very Charismatic and spark filled Video, stars Cameroon’s top Comedian Moustik le Karismatik. 

This Single, Controller is one of a Series of back to back Singles that will be dropped as we build up to the grand project - Black Girl Magic. We want to thank everyone who worked on the project and all fans of Rinyu (RiHive) who are currently anticipating and always available to support her.

Être en couple, c’est synonyme d’amour, de respect et de confiance. Ces trois principes sont la base d’une relation amoureuse solide et saine, bienveillante et sereine. Sans confiance, l’amour devient douloureux et le couple ne peut pas avancer ensemble sur le même chemin pour se construire une véritable histoire d’amour. La confiance est une des choses les plus difficiles à donner à quelqu’un.

Cette chanson nous parle des situations que les gens rencontrent où vivent dans leurs foyer !
